finding: The document does not mention a risk management process.
llm_recommendation: Implement a documented, continuous risk management process covering the full lifecycle.

finding: The document describes data sources but lacks detailed governance practices.
evidence: Llama 3.1 was pretrained on ~15 trillion tokens of data from publicly available sources.
llm_recommendation: Document detailed data governance practices for training, validation, and test datasets.

finding: Technical details are provided but may not be sufficient for compliance assessment.
evidence: For more technical information about generation parameters and recipes for how to use Llama 3.1 in applications, please go here.
llm_recommendation: Ensure technical documentation is comprehensive enough for regulatory compliance assessment.

finding: Some transparency and usage instructions are provided, but not fully detailed.
evidence: Instructions on how to provide feedback or comments on the model can be found in the Llama Models README.
llm_recommendation: Provide detailed transparency and usage instructions to ensure users can interpret outputs correctly.

finding: The document mentions safeguards but lacks details on human oversight capabilities.
evidence: Developers are expected to deploy system safeguards when building agentic systems.
llm_recommendation: Detail how humans can effectively oversee, intervene, and override the system.

finding: Performance under normal conditions is discussed, but adversarial conditions are not addressed.
evidence: Llama 3.1 models outperform many of the available open source and closed chat models on common industry benchmarks.
llm_recommendation: Assess and document the system's performance under adversarial conditions.
